endpoints.name: GET /v2/accounts
endpoints.description: Lists all accounts available to this user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{account}/reports:generate
endpoints.description: Generates an ad hoc report.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNT}} with a real account.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{account}/reports:generateCsv
endpoints.description: Generates a csv formatted ad hoc report.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ACCOUNT}} with a real account.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets information about the selected site.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a custom channel. This method can only be used by projects enabled for the [AdSense for Platforms](https://developers.google.com/adsense/platforms/) product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v2/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates a custom channel. This method can only be used by projects enabled for the [AdSense for Platforms](https://developers.google.com/adsense/platforms/) product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}/adBlockingRecoveryTag
endpoints.description: Gets the ad blocking recovery tag of an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}/adcode
endpoints.description: Gets the ad unit code for a given ad unit. For more information, see [About the AdSense code](https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9274634) and [Where to place the ad code in your HTML](https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9190028).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}/saved
endpoints.description: Gets the saved report from the given resource name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}/saved:generate
endpoints.description: Generates a saved report.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{name}/saved:generateCsv
endpoints.description: Generates a csv formatted saved report.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/adclients
endpoints.description: Lists all the ad clients available in an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/adunits
endpoints.description: Lists all ad units under a specified account and ad client.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/adunits
endpoints.description: Creates an ad unit. This method can only be used by projects enabled for the [AdSense for Platforms](https://developers.google.com/adsense/platforms/) product. Note that ad units can only be created for ad clients with an "AFC" product code. For more info see the [AdClient resource](/adsense/management/reference/rest/v2/accounts.adclients). For now, this method can only be used to create `DISPLAY` ad units. See: https://support.google.com/adsense/answer/9183566
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/alerts
endpoints.description: Lists all the alerts available in an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/customchannels
endpoints.description: Lists all the custom channels available in an ad client.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/{parent}/customchannels
endpoints.description: Creates a custom channel. This method can only be used by projects enabled for the [AdSense for Platforms](https://developers.google.com/adsense/platforms/) product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/payments
endpoints.description: Lists all the payments available for an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/reports/saved
endpoints.description: Lists saved reports.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/sites
endpoints.description: Lists all the sites available in an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}/urlchannels
endpoints.description: Lists active url channels.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}:listChildAccounts
endpoints.description: Lists all accounts directly managed by the given AdSense account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}:listLinkedAdUnits
endpoints.description: Lists all the ad units available for a custom channel.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/{parent}:listLinkedCustomChannels
endpoints.description: Lists all the custom channels available for an ad unit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
